description: 100 natural-language classification cases covering REGULAR_MESSAGE, CEX_WORKFLOW_MESSAGE, TASK_CHAIN_MESSAGE, and COMPREHENSIVE_ANALYSIS_MESSAGE.

cases.label: BTC price check
cases.text: What is the current price of Bitcoin?

cases.label: ETH 24h move
cases.text: Show me Ethereum's 24-hour price change.

cases.label: SOL news headline summary
cases.text: Summarize the latest Solana news headlines for me.

cases.label: Fear and Greed today
cases.text: What does the crypto Fear and Greed Index say today?

cases.label: DOGE volume today
cases.text: Show me DOGE trading volume for today.

cases.label: XRP market cap
cases.text: What is XRP's market cap right now?

cases.label: Explain ETH staking
cases.text: Explain Ethereum staking in one short paragraph.

cases.label: AVAX price
cases.text: Give me the latest AVAX price.

cases.label: LTC up or down
cases.text: Is Litecoin up or down today?

cases.label: ETH gas fees
cases.text: What is the current gas price on Ethereum?

cases.label: BTC daily RSI
cases.text: What does the daily RSI on BTC look like right now?

cases.label: BTC perpetual funding rate
cases.text: Pull the current funding rate for BTC-PERP.

cases.label: ADA price
cases.text: What's the latest price of ADA?

cases.label: BNB headline
cases.text: Give me today's top headline about BNB.

cases.label: LINK price
cases.text: What is the current price of Chainlink?

cases.label: ETH hourly move
cases.text: How much did ETH move in the last hour?

cases.label: Explain market cap
cases.text: What does market cap mean in crypto?

cases.label: Bitcoin dominance
cases.text: Show me Bitcoin dominance right now.

cases.label: Current gas price
cases.text: Give me the current Ethereum gas fee level only.

cases.label: Fear and Greed value only
cases.text: Give me the current Fear and Greed value only.

cases.label: TON price action
cases.text: What's happening with TON price today?

cases.label: Explain stop-loss
cases.text: Explain what a stop-loss is in crypto trading.

cases.label: SOL 24h volume
cases.text: Show the last 24-hour trading volume for SOL.

cases.label: BTC above MA20
cases.text: Is BTC above or below its 20-day moving average right now?

cases.label: ETH ETF quick summary
cases.text: Give me a quick summary of today's Ethereum ETF news.

cases.label: Market buy BTC on Binance
cases.text: Buy 0.02 BTC on Binance at market.

cases.label: Limit sell ETH on OKX
cases.text: Place a limit sell for 5 ETH on OKX at 4200.

cases.label: Cancel Bybit order
cases.text: Cancel my Bybit order ABC-789.

cases.label: Open BTC short
cases.text: Open a short on BTC-PERP on OKX with 0.5 BTC size.

cases.label: Close ETH perp position
cases.text: Close my ETH-PERP position on Bybit.

cases.label: Set BTC stop-loss
cases.text: Put in a stop-loss order for BTC at 58000 on Binance.

cases.label: Buy SOL with quote amount
cases.text: Buy 1000 USDT worth of SOL on Binance.

cases.label: Sell XRP on OKX
cases.text: Sell 2500 XRP on OKX.

cases.label: Limit buy AVAX
cases.text: Place a limit buy for 10 AVAX at 32 on Bybit.

cases.label: Cancel all BTC orders
cases.text: Cancel all open BTC/USDT orders on Binance.

cases.label: Set BTC take profit
cases.text: Set a take-profit sell for 1 BTC at 70000 on OKX.

cases.label: Open ETH long
cases.text: Open a long on ETH-PERP with a market order on Bybit.

cases.label: Reduce SOL position
cases.text: Reduce my SOL-PERP position by 25% on OKX.

cases.label: IOC BTC buy order
cases.text: Place an IOC buy order for 0.1 BTC at 60000 on Binance.

cases.label: Buy DOGE now
cases.text: Buy 500 DOGE right now on Binance.

cases.label: Continuation exchange reply
cases.text: Use Binance spot.

context.speaker: user
context.text: I want to buy some BTC.

context.speaker: agent
context.text: Sure. Which exchange should I use for the order?

cases.label: Continuation symbol reply
cases.text: Let's use BTC/USDT.

context.speaker: user
context.text: I want to buy BTC on Binance.

context.speaker: agent
context.text: Which trading pair should I use?

cases.label: Continuation side reply
cases.text: Make it a buy order.

context.speaker: user
context.text: I want to trade ETH-PERP on OKX.

context.speaker: agent
context.text: Should this be a buy or a sell?

cases.label: Continuation quantity reply
cases.text: I want 0.05 BTC.

context.speaker: user
context.text: Buy BTC/USDT on Binance.

context.speaker: agent
context.text: How much would you like to buy?

cases.label: Continuation order type reply
cases.text: Go with a limit order at 59800.

context.speaker: user
context.text: Buy 0.05 BTC on Binance.

context.speaker: agent
context.text: Do you want a market or limit order?

cases.label: Continuation limit price reply
cases.text: Set the limit price to 60150.

context.speaker: user
context.text: Buy BTC/USDT on Binance with a limit order.

context.speaker: agent
context.text: What limit price would you like to use?

cases.label: Continuation time in force reply
cases.text: Use GTC for that order.

context.speaker: user
context.text: Place a limit buy for BTC/USDT on Binance.

context.speaker: agent
context.text: What time-in-force should I use: GTC, IOC, or FOK?

cases.label: Continuation stop-loss reply
cases.text: Set the stop-loss at 57500.

context.speaker: user
context.text: I want to buy BTC on Binance and add risk protection.

context.speaker: agent
context.text: What stop-loss price should I set?

cases.label: Continuation confirmation reply
cases.text: Yes, place it.

context.speaker: user
context.text: Buy 0.05 BTC on Binance with a limit order at 60000.

context.speaker: agent
context.text: Ready to place the order. Do you want me to proceed?

cases.label: Continuation order id reply
cases.text: The order ID is ABC-789.

context.speaker: user
context.text: I need to cancel an order on Bybit.

context.speaker: agent
context.text: Please share the order ID you want to cancel.

cases.label: Layer 2 ranking
cases.text: Compare Ethereum Layer 2 tokens and identify which two deserve more research today.

cases.label: BTC ETH whale plus sentiment
cases.text: Review BTC and ETH whale activity plus social sentiment.

cases.label: TON and NEAR multi-factor
cases.text: Compare recent news, on-chain usage, and price action for TON and NEAR.

cases.label: Build three-coin watchlist
cases.text: Build a short watchlist of three coins with bullish setups based on trend and volume.

cases.label: Altseason evaluation
